capabilities.label: Read resident robot state
capabilities.safety_note: Read the MoonTown robot projection without bridge authority.

capabilities.label: Read bridge sidecar manifest
capabilities.safety_note: Inspect bridge launchability without starting or commanding hardware.

capabilities.label: Read runtime calibration plan
capabilities.safety_note: Inspect calibration blockers before any physical execution route is used.

capabilities.label: Run runtime validation session
capabilities.safety_note: Collect repeated runtime readiness evidence without dispatching a physical task.

capabilities.label: Read MoonBook memory
capabilities.safety_note: Read durable robot memory packs only.

capabilities.label: Read Robo conversation
capabilities.safety_note: Read the MoonBook-backed user/Robo conversation without separate chat authority.

capabilities.label: Read Robo session
capabilities.safety_note: Projects the current one-to-one Robo session from MoonBook task messages, RoboBook evidence, and MoonRobo turns.

capabilities.label: Read task-message ledger
capabilities.safety_note: Read persisted task-message plans, lifecycle stage, and next safe route.

capabilities.label: Read task-message status
capabilities.safety_note: Project one task-message lifecycle from MoonBook and RoboBook evidence.

capabilities.label: Submit operator task message
capabilities.safety_note: Lower-level MoonBook/MoonTown ledger primitive for surfaces that need to save a plan without running the user-facing Robo ask wrapper.

capabilities.label: Ask Robo for a task
capabilities.safety_note: Persists the same MoonBook task message and returns conversation, memory, loop proof, live readiness, and the current MoonRobo handoff; it is not a separate chat authority.

capabilities.label: Run canonical Robo loop
capabilities.safety_note: Optionally accepts one task message, persists one loop artifact, and returns the restored session and MoonClaw handoff point.

capabilities.label: Run one Robo turn
capabilities.safety_note: Persists a MoonBook task message and returns the current MoonClaw handoff point without running MoonClaw policy locally.

capabilities.label: Read Robo turn history
capabilities.safety_note: Lists persisted Robo turn artifacts without changing robot or memory state.

capabilities.label: Read one Robo turn
capabilities.safety_note: Reads a single persisted Robo turn artifact for replay or audit.

capabilities.label: Read Robo loop history
capabilities.safety_note: Lists persisted canonical Robo loop artifacts without changing robot or memory state.

capabilities.label: Read one Robo loop
capabilities.safety_note: Reads a single persisted Robo loop artifact for session restore, replay, or audit.

capabilities.label: Run bounded observation task
capabilities.safety_note: Collects bounded observation evidence without granting command execution authority.

capabilities.label: Read Robo handoff summary
capabilities.safety_note: Returns the current handoff state, proof/readiness summary, and MoonClaw context route without selecting MoonClaw policy.

capabilities.label: Submit gateway command
capabilities.safety_note: Accepts a MoonClaw-authored robot command as durable Robo task input; MoonRobo persists and gates it but does not host MoonClaw policy.

capabilities.label: Annotate replay evidence
capabilities.safety_note: Creates curation evidence only and does not authorize policy or hardware execution.

capabilities.label: Advance task-message safety gate
capabilities.safety_note: Advances a persisted task-message gate only through explicit operator-visible routes.

capabilities.label: Read closed-loop proof status
capabilities.safety_note: Summarizes how far the current RoboBook root is from the desired MoonClaw-to-MoonRobo physical loop.

capabilities.label: Read proof readiness
capabilities.safety_note: Projects runtime validation, calibration, proof-session, and loop-proof state before any gateway command attempt.

capabilities.label: Run closed-loop proof
capabilities.safety_note: Bootstraps non-physical substrate, attempts the MoonClaw gateway command through existing gates, and returns before/after loop proof.

capabilities.label: Run repeated closed-loop proof session
capabilities.safety_note: Runs bounded repeated prove-loop attempts with safe defaults and persists one proof-session artifact.

capabilities.label: Read live exercise history
capabilities.safety_note: Lists persisted aggregate live exercise artifacts for repeated physical-world hardening comparison.

capabilities.label: Read one live exercise
capabilities.safety_note: Reads one persisted live exercise artifact without running another validation, gateway command, or proof session.

capabilities.label: Read proof-session history
capabilities.safety_note: Lists persisted closed-loop proof sessions for audit, replay, and resident recovery surfaces.

capabilities.label: Read one proof session
capabilities.safety_note: Reads one persisted proof-session artifact without running another physical or MoonClaw routine loop.

capabilities.label: Bind execution feedback
capabilities.safety_note: Persists a telemetry feedback frame for an existing task execution, validates command echo evidence, and refreshes MoonBook memory.

capabilities.label: Read robot routine context
capabilities.safety_note: Reads resident, review, memory, gateway, and registered-tool context; MoonClaw owns the policy step.

capabilities.label: Read cockpit snapshot
capabilities.safety_note: Renders robot state and evidence without owning robot parsing or bridge authority.

capabilities.label: Ask Robo from cockpit
capabilities.safety_note: Submits operator text through the user-facing Robo ask wrapper while keeping durable conversation and memory in MoonBook.
